title: Multivariable Calculus and Fields · Guided Modeling Studio
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving temperature and transport fields. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a reproducible multivariable calculus computational study while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate partial derivatives in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive gradient directional in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute multiple integrals in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
